source_of_truth.path: /Users/caolei/Desktop/Obsidian_root/011_项目经验/互联网+/lingobridge/Records&Drafts/03-02-LingoBridge MVP PRD v2.0.md

project.name: LingoBridge
project.positioning: 哈萨克斯坦留学生的中文学习工具网站，跟着老师PPT走，课后能练发音。

current_state.backend: Express MVP API scaffold implemented with local JSON metadata and local file storage
current_state.deployment: Vercel prototype only; Tencent Cloud public test pending
critical_mock_surfaces: PPTX/PDF page extraction uses fallback-generated pages
TTS provider uses browser fallback when cloud credentials are absent
Dashboards and reports remain visual mocks

implementation_status.summary: MVP data backbone completed: real Excel parser with schema validation (xlsx package), LearningTask/VocabularyItem database entities, homework/tasks API, vocabulary API, learning-records API. HomeworkView and VocabularyView now fetch from API instead of mock data. Logo replaced with root logo.svg. TeacherCoursesView has separate courseware and Excel upload buttons. Remaining: PDF.js preview/annotation (mock placeholder), virtual background (MediaPipe not implemented), live session API (no WebRTC), MinIO storage (local fs). Tencent Cloud deployment blocked — tccli not installed.

verification.e2e_browser: passed: 22/22 steps in headed Chromium (fake media stream)
verification.docker_local: passed: backend + nginx containers running, health code:0

open_items: Install Tencent Cloud CLI (tccli) and deploy to CVM for public test
Verify camera/mic/screen indicator cleanup in a real browser (browser_pending_manual)
Replace fallback PPTX/PDF/Excel handling with real parsers/converters when demo time allows
Add real object storage and cloud TTS providers after MVP path is stable

customer_delivery_revision.purpose: 将本轮 agent 执行报告从“本地 smoke 通过”升级为可给甲方交付的产品口径：老师端有课件、直播、作业 Excel 三个入口；学生端有直播、homework 录音练习、vocabulary 自学三个入口；Excel 成为作业与单词库的数据标准。

accepted: PM2、Docker、本地 smoke、headed E2E 的证据可作为本地可运行性证明。
Tencent Cloud 部署被 tccli 缺失阻塞的判断成立，需要安装并配置腾讯云 CLI 后继续。
真实摄像头指示器验证无法完全自动化，需要真实硬件和人工观察。
gaps: HomeworkView 与 VocabularyView 当前仍以 mock 数据为主，未真正接入老师上传的 Excel 作业数据。
后端 Excel 解析当前是 fallback 练习生成，不满足“Excel 标准表单 -> 学生作业/单词库”的交付口径。
虚拟背景不应继续放在 out-of-scope；甲方已明确直播时需要该能力，MVP 可先交付浏览器端虚拟背景。
Logo 组件仍内嵌旧 SVG，需要替换为根目录 logo.svg 并统一侧栏/落地页使用。
agent_report_audit.decision: 本轮 PRD 以“学习任务数据标准 + homework/vocabulary 通路打通 + 直播虚拟背景 + logo 替换 + 腾讯云部署”为下一批验收主线。

client_answers.question: 腾讯云 CLI 是否需要下载？
client_answers.answer: 需要。R048-R053 阻塞不是代码失败，而是开发机缺少 tccli。交付动作是安装 tccli，配置 CAM 子账号 SecretId/SecretKey、地域和 CVM 目标，然后执行镜像/compose/nginx/health 部署验证。密钥只进本机环境变量或 .env，不进仓库。

client_answers.question: PPTX 渲染怎么处理？
client_answers.answer: MVP 阶段课件入口支持 pptx/pdf，但由于浏览器端完整还原 PPTX 动画、字体、音频、版式成本高，正式演示建议老师上传 PDF 作为课件展示格式；pptx 作为原文件归档，后端异步转 PDF/图片作为后续增强。

client_answers.question: 直播虚拟背景怎么实现？
client_answers.answer: 参考腾讯会议/Teams 的产品形态，MVP 使用浏览器端 getUserMedia 获取摄像头，MediaPipe Selfie Segmentation 或 TensorFlow.js BodyPix 做人像分割，把人像与背景图/模糊背景合成到 canvas，再用 canvas.captureStream() 替代原摄像头流进入直播/录制。后续如果接入 TRTC，则把合成流作为 custom video track 推送。

client_answers.question: 学生 homework 和 vocabulary 的数据从哪里来？
client_answers.answer: 由老师上传的课程练习 Excel 生成。每一行是一个可练习任务，task_type 决定进入 homework 还是 vocabulary；同一份或多份 Excel 会沉淀为学生 homework 队列和 vocabulary 自学知识库，学生录音、TTS、完成状态和学习记录都绑定到 task_id。

live_classroom_revision.purpose: 教师端 live 课堂从“功能展示页”收敛为真实上课工作台：老师优先关注课件/屏幕画面、摄像头、录制状态和学生评论；AI 转录翻译作为可隐藏的辅助面板，不占用主画面。
teacher_layout_rule: 默认主区域显示 PDF/屏幕投屏画面，右下或侧边显示摄像头预览。
顶部或底部保留录制状态、保存按钮、摄像头/麦克风/屏幕共享/PDF 模式切换。
学生弹幕/评论作为课堂互动面板保留，可折叠但默认可见。
实时 AI 转录与翻译面板必须可隐藏；教师上课默认隐藏或折叠，仅在录播复盘/学生端回放/字幕模式中展示。

pdf_whiteboard_requirement.pdf_preview: 教师端必须支持 PDF 预览、上一页/下一页、页码状态、缩放适配；MVP 推荐使用 PDF.js 将页面渲染到 canvas。
pdf_whiteboard_requirement.annotation_layer: PDF 上方叠加独立 annotation canvas，支持画笔颜色、粗细、橡皮擦、清空当前页、撤销，至少能稳定渲染笔迹。

library_options.name: PDF.js
library_options.reason: 浏览器原生 canvas 渲染 PDF，适合把课件页作为底层画面。

library_options.name: Excalidraw
library_options.reason: 可作为 React component 嵌入，并通过 onChange/imperative API 获取场景元素；适合接近 Excalidraw 的手绘体验。

library_options.name: tldraw
library_options.use: 更完整的无限画布 SDK
library_options.reason: 适合后续多人协同白板，但 MVP 体积和集成复杂度高于轻量 canvas 或 Excalidraw。

pdf_whiteboard_requirement.mvp_decision: MVP 先使用 PDF.js + 自研轻量 annotation canvas，避免引入过重白板编辑器；若甲方明确要求 Excalidraw 质感，再引入 @excalidraw/excalidraw。

screen_cast_requirement.browser_screen_share: 本地屏幕共享使用 navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia()，由老师在浏览器授权选择屏幕/窗口/标签页；拿到 MediaStream 后进入课堂画面、录制或 WebRTC/TRTC 推流。
screen_cast_requirement.device_cast_boundary: 纯 Web 页面不能静默向系统外接显示器、投影仪或 Chromecast 发起投屏。若要“真实投屏到设备”，必须走用户授权的浏览器投屏 UI、Google Cast Web Sender SDK、AirPlay/系统投屏，或桌面端封装能力。
screen_cast_requirement.mvp_decision: MVP 交付真实屏幕共享/本地投屏画面进入课堂，不承诺静默控制外部投影设备；如甲方现场有 Chromecast/会议屏，单独评估 Google Cast Web Sender。

auto_recording_requirement.entry_behavior: 老师进入课堂后自动准备录制；在浏览器权限允许后自动调用 MediaRecorder 开始录制课程画面流。
auto_recording_requirement.stream_composition: 录制流应由 PDF/屏幕画面、annotation canvas、摄像头画面、麦克风音频混合而成；MVP 可以先录制主画面 + 麦克风 + 摄像头或当前已有 MediaStream。
auto_recording_requirement.save_behavior: 录制分片保存在前端 Blob 队列，结束或定时切片后上传到后端；后端写入 MinIO/S3 兼容对象存储并生成 lecture_recording 元数据。
auto_recording_requirement.permission_boundary: 浏览器安全策略不允许在没有用户授权的情况下自动获取摄像头、麦克风或屏幕；自动录制必须发生在老师已授权媒体权限之后。

storage_requirement.provider: MinIO first for MVP private deployment; Tencent COS can be added through the same object-storage adapter.
storage_requirement.upload_mode: Backend direct upload is acceptable for small MVP files; preferred production path is backend生成 presigned PUT URL，前端直传 MinIO，完成后回调写 metadata。

teacher_entrypoints.name: 上传课件
teacher_entrypoints.mvp_rule: PDF 是课堂展示一等格式；PPTX 可上传归档，渲染优先走转 PDF/图片，失败时提示老师上传 PDF。

teacher_entrypoints.name: 直播课堂与虚拟背景
teacher_entrypoints.mvp_rule: 虚拟背景先在本地浏览器端合成，不依赖服务端 GPU；需要 HTTPS 或 localhost 才能稳定使用摄像头。

teacher_entrypoints.name: 上传学生作业 Excel
teacher_entrypoints.mvp_rule: Excel 必须符合 homework_excel_schema；后端校验字段、生成 task_id，并同步到 homework 与 vocabulary。

student_entrypoints.name: 进入实时直播间
student_entrypoints.data_source: 当前课程 live_session 或最近一节课程
student_entrypoints.acceptance: 学生侧能从导航/课表进入直播，看到老师视频/屏幕或课件页，后续可接入 TRTC 实时流。

student_entrypoints.name: homework 路径学习
student_entrypoints.data_source: Excel 中 publish_to_homework=true 的任务
student_entrypoints.acceptance: 学生按课程/单元/课次看到任务路径，进入题目后可听 TTS、录音、上传、回放、删除，并保存完成记录。

student_entrypoints.name: vocabulary 单词自学
student_entrypoints.data_source: 所有老师已发布 Excel 中 publish_to_vocab=true 的词条
student_entrypoints.acceptance: 学生可搜索/筛选词条，按声母、韵母、声调或课程分组练习；发音录音和学习结果写入 learning_records。

homework_excel_schema.file_rule: 一个 Excel 文件对应一门课或一个单元；第一行必须是字段名；建议工作表名为 tasks，MVP 只解析第一个工作表。
homework_excel_schema.boolean_rule: publish_to_homework 和 publish_to_vocab 使用 TRUE/FALSE 或 1/0。
homework_excel_schema.identity_rule: task_id 在同一 course_code 内唯一；重复上传同一 task_id 时按最新 Excel 覆盖题干和发布状态，但保留学生历史记录。

sample_rows.prompt: 请朗读句子，注意第四声。

seed_task_groups: 朗读句子：现在上课。请你读。很好。下课。请跟我读。你听，我说。休息一下。

data_flow: Teacher uploads PDF/PPTX -> file_metadata/course_pages -> teacher-classroom PDF mode and student-classroom page browsing.
Teacher uploads XLSX -> parser validates schema -> learning_tasks table -> homework assignments and vocabulary bank views.
Student opens homework -> GET /api/v1/homework/tasks -> TTS -> MediaRecorder -> POST /api/v1/recordings with task_id -> POST /api/v1/learning-records.
Student opens vocabulary -> GET /api/v1/vocabulary -> TTS/recording/session result -> learning_records aggregated into progress.
Teacher starts live -> optional virtual background canvas stream -> classroom preview/recording now, TRTC custom stream later.

handoff_for_next_agents.status: PRD updated after route/live/courses audit. Some code has been partially corrected, but the items below are not fully delivered.
non_negotiable_route_contract: Teacher live route and student live route must use the same live classroom experience/component family.
Teacher live route: `teacher-classroom`, role=teacher, can manage class, upload/select PDF, annotate, share screen, record, save replay, moderate comments.
Student live route: `student-classroom`, role=student, can view teacher live stage/PDF/screen, use camera/mic if allowed, send comments, raise hand, and leave; must not see teacher-only controls.
`StudentClassroomView` must not be used as the live room. If kept, it is only a course-practice/recording page and must be renamed or routed under homework/practice to avoid future confusion.
Dashboard and Schedule `Join Live Class` buttons must navigate to `student-classroom`, and that route must resolve to the shared live classroom in student role.
forbidden_implementation_mistakes: Do not create a separate fake student live page to satisfy routing. Fix the shared route/component contract instead.
Do not add timer-generated fake danmaku, fake transcript, fake students, fake courses, or fake live sessions as if they were real data.
Do not hardcode English UI text in teacher courses/live pages; every visible label must use `t(...)` or API-provided user content.
Do not make AI transcript/translation occupy teacher live default layout. It must stay hidden/collapsed unless explicitly opened.
Do not claim PPTX is truly rendered if the implementation only shows fallback placeholder pages. Use PDF as MVP first-class display format.
Do not silently start camera/mic/screen capture. Browser permission prompts are mandatory; auto-recording only starts after permission.
partially_completed_context: Student dashboard live entry has been redirected in code to the shared classroom component with student role, but live session API/state is still not implemented.

Teacher live mock auto-danmaku and mock auto-transcript have been removed from code, and transcript defaults hidden, but the page still contains placeholder PDF visuals, placeholder participants, and incomplete data-backed comments.
Teacher courses visible copy has been moved toward i18n, but full static-text audit across all course/live/schedule/dashboard surfaces remains required.

TeacherCoursesView loads API courses, but course management is still shallow: no edit/delete/archive/detail page, no separation of courseware upload vs homework Excel upload, and no real Excel parsing.
recommended_next_order: T24 route guard and live-state API contract
T25 teacher courses real management and no-mock audit
T13 Excel parser and schema validation
T14/T15 homework and vocabulary API wiring
T20 PDF.js preview/page turning plus annotation canvas
T21/T22 MinIO recording storage and auto-recording

okrts.objective: Make the PRD v3.0 MVP demonstrable by 2026-05-15: teacher courseware/uploaded Excel, student course practice/homework/vocabulary, TTS, recording storage/management, teacher live/replay, and Tencent Cloud public test.

key_results.name: MVP core learning loop works
key_results.acceptance: PPT/PDF upload -> course page -> TTS -> student record -> upload -> play/delete/download.

key_results.name: Teacher courseware upload works
key_results.acceptance: Teacher can upload .pptx, .pdf, .xlsx; .pptx/.pdf become course pages; .xlsx syncs as practice/homework data.

key_results.name: Student practice page works
key_results.acceptance: Course pages support navigation, Chinese TTS, recording, and own recording list.

key_results.name: Recording storage is real
key_results.acceptance: Audio is uploaded to backend/storage abstraction and linked to student/course/page.

key_results.name: Teacher recording and replay works
key_results.acceptance: Teacher classroom recording auto-starts after media permission, saves to MinIO/object storage, and students can find replay by date in schedule/history.

key_results.name: Live mode demo works
key_results.acceptance: Teacher can choose local screen share mode or uploaded/existing PDF mode; PDF page turning, annotation canvas drawing, camera, recording controls, and student comments work; AI transcript panel is hideable.

key_results.name: Camera and microphone permission bug is fixed
key_results.acceptance: Toggling off or exiting stops all media tracks and browser camera indicator closes.

key_results.name: Three-language UI remains usable
key_results.acceptance: Chinese/Russian/Kazakh switching works on demo-critical pages.

key_results.name: Tencent Cloud public test works
key_results.acceptance: Public frontend opens and /api/v1/health returns OK.

risks.risk: Scope expands into full LMS or SaaS.
risks.control: Use PRD v3.0 as source of truth; do not implement out-of-scope roadmap features.
Convert PPTX to PDF/pages or require PDF fallback for MVP demo.

risks.risk: Browser camera/mic remains active after UI toggle.
risks.control: Stop all MediaStream tracks on toggle off, exit, unmount, and recording stop.

risks.risk: Plaintext secrets exist in local documentation.
risks.control: Rotate exposed keys, never commit secrets, use .env and .gitignore.

risks.risk: Direct IP public deployment lacks HTTPS.
risks.control: Accept only for MVP test; production needs domain and HTTPS.

signals: Manual teacher-student MVP path can be recorded end to end

in.name: PPT/PDF import
in.description: Upload PPT/PDF, parse or convert to course pages, support page browsing.

in.name: Course-practice sync
in.description: Associate PPT/page content with practice items; Excel can create preview/homework rows linked to course/page.

in.name: Chinese TTS
in.description: Course page button triggers TTS API; browser TTS fallback allowed when provider is missing.

in.name: Recording storage
in.description: Upload audio to storage and link metadata to student/course/page.

in.name: Recording management
in.description: Student can play, delete, and download own recordings.

in.name: Replay
in.description: Teacher classroom recording auto-starts after permission, saves to MinIO/S3-compatible object storage, and students can replay by date in schedule/history.

in.name: Teacher live modes
in.description: Local screen share mode and PDF mode with PDF.js page turning, annotation canvas drawing, camera preview, recording controls, student comments, and hideable AI transcript panel.

in.name: Teacher virtual background
in.description: Teacher camera can use blur or uploaded/static virtual background during live preview and lecture recording through browser-side canvas stream composition.

in.name: Excel homework standard
in.description: Teacher uploads structured Excel; backend validates rows and converts them into homework tasks, vocabulary items, and learning records.

in.name: Homework/vocabulary data integration
in.description: Student HomeworkView and VocabularyView consume Excel-derived API data instead of mock-only local arrays.

in.name: Live classroom storage and comments
in.description: Teacher live room supports student comment stream, lecture recording metadata, and MinIO-backed media persistence.

entities: user(id, username, password_hash, role, display_name, language_pref, created_at)
course_page(id, course_id, page_number, content_html, audio_text, image_url)

learning_task(id, course_id, source_file_id, task_id, task_type, unit, lesson, lesson_title, page_number, zh_text, pinyin, translation_ru, translation_kk, prompt, answer, initial, final, tone, rhyme_group, difficulty, due_at, publish_to_homework, publish_to_vocab, sort_order, created_at, updated_at)
exercise(id, course_id, page_number, task_id, prompt, answer, source_file_id, created_at)
vocabulary_item(id, course_id, task_id, zh_text, pinyin, translation_ru, translation_kk, initial, final, tone, rhyme_group, difficulty, tags, source_file_id, created_at)
learning_record(id, student_id, task_id, context, status, score, attempts_count, last_recording_id, completed_at, updated_at)
recording(id, student_id, course_id, page_number, task_id, audio_url, duration_sec, created_at)
lecture_recording(id, course_id, teacher_id, live_session_id, video_url, storage_provider, object_key, duration_sec, auto_started_at, saved_at, created_at)
live_session(id, course_id, teacher_id, status, source_mode, current_page, recording_status, started_at, ended_at)
classroom_comment(id, live_session_id, student_id, body, created_at, visibility)
file_metadata(id, owner_id, course_id, type, filename, mime_type, size_bytes, storage_url, created_at)

storage.course_pages: object storage or local upload directory for MVP
storage.lecture_video: WebM object in MinIO/S3-compatible storage for MVP
storage.metadata: PostgreSQL preferred; SQLite/local JSON acceptable only as emergency demo fallback

routes.purpose: save homework/vocabulary progress and bind latest recording
create/start teacher live session and recording state
update source mode/current PDF page/recording status
create MinIO/S3-compatible presigned upload URL for lecture/student media

frontend_integration_targets: src/components/StudentClassroomView.tsx (legacy practice only; do not use for live route)

No real API key/token in git diff

GET /api/v1/live-sessions/active?courseId= returns active session or null
PATCH /api/v1/live-sessions/:id updates source_mode, current_page, recording_status, and ended_at
GET/POST /api/v1/live-sessions/:id/comments list and create classroom comments

No route named live/classroom imports the practice component

Camera/mic/screen tracks stop after toggle off and exit

ralph_2min_prd_steps.purpose: 把剩余工作拆成 2 分钟内可执行、低判断、可复制的小步骤。每一步只允许做一件事，并留下可验证证据。
rules: 每个 step 的目标必须能用一个命令、一个文件改动、一次页面点击、或一次文档记录完成。
本机模拟开发必须先使用 PM2 管理端口和进程，不再用临时 npm run dev 或临时 Docker 端口碰运气。
本机 PM2 验证通过后，才进入 Docker 打包。
Docker 打包通过后，才使用 Tencent Cloud CLI 部署并挂载服务。
如果某一步失败，只记录 blocker、命令、错误摘要和下一步建议，不做大范围排查。
禁止扩展 PRD v3.0 之外的 LMS/SaaS/支付/广义社交/AI 评分功能。
definition_of_done_per_step: 记录证据：命令输出、文件路径、截图路径、或报告段落
如果失败，记录最小 blocker，不顺手重构

steps.title: 确认 PM2 当前进程列表
steps.action: Run `pm2 list`.
steps.acceptance: 能看到是否已有 `lingobridge-*` 进程，以及是否有其它项目占用常用端口。
steps.proof: 把 `pm2 list` 关键行写入 e2e smoke report 的 Environment 部分。

steps.title: 确认 3001 后端端口是否空闲
steps.action: Run `lsof -nP -iTCP:3001 -sTCP:LISTEN`.
steps.acceptance: 端口空闲，或占用者是 `lingobridge-backend`。
steps.proof: 记录端口状态；不要杀非 LingoBridge 进程。

steps.title: 确认 4173 前端端口是否空闲
steps.action: Run `lsof -nP -iTCP:4173 -sTCP:LISTEN`.
steps.acceptance: 如果被其它项目占用，标记为不可用。
steps.proof: 记录占用进程名称和 PID。

steps.title: 选择 LingoBridge 前端固定端口
steps.action: 如果 4173 被占用，检查 4174；若空闲则使用 4174。
steps.acceptance: 确定一个不冲突的固定端口。
steps.proof: 在 `ecosystem.config.cjs`、README、本 PRD 中保持同一个端口。

steps.title: 更新 PM2 前端 preview 端口
steps.action: Edit `ecosystem.config.cjs` so `lingobridge-frontend-preview` uses the chosen fixed port with `--strictPort`.
steps.acceptance: 配置中没有随机端口；端口和文档一致。

steps.title: 更新本机端口说明
steps.action: Edit README local simulation section to match backend and frontend PM2 ports.
steps.acceptance: README 明确写 PM2 first、backend port、frontend port。
steps.proof: `rg -n "Local stable ports|PM2" README.md` returns the section.

steps.title: 重启 PM2 LingoBridge 服务
steps.action: Run `npm run pm2:restart`.
steps.acceptance: `lingobridge-backend` and `lingobridge-frontend-preview` are online.

steps.title: 检查 PM2 后端日志
steps.action: Run `pm2 logs lingobridge-backend --lines 30 --nostream`.
steps.acceptance: 日志显示 API listening on `127.0.0.1:3001`，无启动错误。

steps.title: 检查 PM2 前端日志
steps.action: Run `pm2 logs lingobridge-frontend-preview --lines 30 --nostream`.
steps.acceptance: 日志显示 Vite preview ready，且没有 port in use。
steps.proof: 记录 ready 或 local URL 行。

steps.title: 验证后端 health
steps.action: Run `curl --noproxy '*' -sS http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/v1/health`.
steps.acceptance: 返回 `code:0` and `status:ok`。

steps.title: 验证前端 preview 首页
steps.action: Run curl against the PM2 frontend preview URL.
steps.acceptance: HTTP 200 and `text/html`。
steps.proof: 记录 HTTP code and content type。

steps.title: 验证 demo teacher 登录 API
steps.action: POST `/api/v1/auth/login` with `teacher@test.com` and `Test@123456`.
steps.acceptance: 返回 user role `teacher`。
steps.proof: 记录 role，不记录 token 全量。

steps.title: 验证 demo student 登录 API
steps.action: POST `/api/v1/auth/login` with `student_a@test.com` and `Test@123456`.
steps.acceptance: 返回 user role `student`。
steps.proof: 记录 role，不记录 token 全量。

steps.title: 验证课程列表 API
steps.action: GET `/api/v1/courses`.
steps.acceptance: 返回数组；至少不报错。

steps.title: 打开有头浏览器到 PM2 前端
steps.action: Use Playwright CLI `open <frontend-url> --headed`.
steps.acceptance: 浏览器可见 LingoBridge 首页。

steps.title: 教师登录页面可达
steps.action: Click Login and snapshot.
steps.acceptance: Email/password inputs visible。

steps.title: 教师登录成功
steps.action: Fill teacher credentials and submit.
steps.acceptance: Teacher dashboard/sidebar visible。
steps.proof: Screenshot or snapshot showing teacher navigation.

steps.title: 教师课程页可达
steps.action: Click Courses.
steps.acceptance: My Courses section visible。

steps.title: 创建 E2E 测试课程
steps.action: Enter `E2E Smoke Course` and click Create.
steps.acceptance: 新课程卡片出现。
steps.proof: 课程卡片截图或 API 课程数量变化。

steps.title: 上传 PDF fixture
steps.action: Upload small `.pdf` fixture through teacher course upload.
steps.acceptance: UI message shows pages generated, expected `Pages: 3` for fallback。

steps.title: 上传 XLSX fixture
steps.action: Upload small `.xlsx` fixture through teacher course upload.
steps.acceptance: UI message shows exercises generated, expected `exercises: 2` for fallback。

steps.title: 进入教师课堂
steps.action: Click Enter Class from the test course.
steps.acceptance: Teacher classroom controls visible。

steps.title: 验证摄像头按钮 UI 状态
steps.action: Click Start Video in headed browser.
steps.acceptance: If fake media is enabled, button changes to Stop Video. If real permission blocks, record blocker only.

steps.title: 验证摄像头关闭 UI 状态
steps.action: Click Stop Video.
steps.acceptance: Button returns to Start Video or camera state visibly off。

steps.title: 验证麦克风按钮 UI 状态
steps.action: Click Unmute Mic, then Mute Mic.
steps.acceptance: Button toggles without crash. If permission blocks, record blocker only。

steps.title: 验证教师录制上传
steps.action: With fake media or available stream, start Recording, wait briefly, stop Recording.
steps.acceptance: Upload success alert appears or lecture API records one item。

steps.title: 记录真实摄像头指示器验证状态
steps.action: If real camera permission is available, observe OS/browser camera indicator after Stop Video and Leave Class.
steps.acceptance: Indicator closes; if not observable in automation, mark `browser_pending_manual`。
steps.proof: Manual note in e2e smoke report.

steps.title: 学生登录成功
steps.action: Logout or clear session, login as `student_a@test.com`.
steps.acceptance: Student dashboard/sidebar visible。

steps.title: 学生课堂页面可达
steps.action: Open student classroom/course page.
steps.acceptance: Generated course page visible。

steps.title: 学生翻页可用
steps.action: Click next/previous page controls.
steps.acceptance: Page number or content changes。

steps.title: 学生 TTS 不崩溃
steps.action: Click TTS/speaker button.
steps.acceptance: No UI crash; backend fallback may be used。
steps.proof: Console has no new error or UI remains usable.

steps.title: 学生录音上传
steps.action: Use fake mic or real mic to record briefly and stop.
steps.acceptance: Recording appears in list or upload API returns success。

steps.title: 学生录音播放
steps.action: Click play on uploaded recording.
steps.acceptance: No UI crash and audio element/action starts。

steps.title: 学生录音下载
steps.action: Click download on uploaded recording.
steps.acceptance: Browser download is triggered or link is reachable。
steps.proof: Record link reachability or download event.

steps.title: 学生录音删除
steps.action: Click delete on uploaded recording.
steps.acceptance: Recording disappears or API delete returns deleted true。

steps.title: 学生课表回放可见
steps.action: Open schedule/history replay view.
steps.acceptance: Teacher lecture replay list loads; empty state is acceptable only if no lecture was uploaded。

steps.title: 创建 E2E smoke report 文件
steps.action: Create `tests/acceptance/e2e-smoke-report.md` from the existing prompt format.
steps.acceptance: File has Environment, Results, Blocking Defects, Non-Blocking Notes, Screenshots sections.

steps.title: 填写 PM2 环境信息
steps.action: Add frontend URL, backend URL, PM2 process names, browser mode.
steps.acceptance: Environment section is complete。
steps.proof: Report contains URLs and PM2 names.

steps.title: 填写教师上传结果
steps.action: Record R017-R022 pass/fail in the report.
steps.acceptance: Teacher login, course creation, PDF upload, XLSX upload, classroom entry rows are filled。

steps.title: 填写媒体验证结果
steps.action: Record camera/mic/replay upload status.
steps.acceptance: Real camera indicator is either Pass or explicitly `browser_pending_manual`。

steps.title: 填写学生学习闭环结果
steps.action: Record student login, page navigation, TTS, recording upload/play/download/delete.
steps.acceptance: Every student loop row is Pass/Fail/Blocked, no blank cells。

steps.title: 列出阻塞缺陷
steps.action: Add only defects that block PRD MVP demo.
steps.acceptance: No generic TODOs; each blocker has exact failed step id。

steps.title: 确认本机 E2E 是否允许进入 Docker
steps.action: Check e2e smoke report for blocking defects.
steps.acceptance: No blocking defects before Docker packaging starts。

steps.title: 确认 Docker Hub 可拉取基础镜像
steps.action: Run `docker pull node:20-alpine` only after local E2E gate passes.
steps.acceptance: Image pulls successfully, or blocker recorded as registry/network issue。

steps.title: 构建 backend Docker 镜像
steps.action: Run `docker compose build backend`.
steps.acceptance: Build completes without error。
steps.proof: Build final line or image id.

steps.title: 启动 Docker compose 服务
steps.action: Run `docker compose up -d` from `docker/`.
steps.acceptance: backend and nginx containers are running。

steps.title: 验证 Docker health
steps.action: Curl Docker-served `/api/v1/health`.
steps.acceptance: Returns `code:0`。

steps.title: 确认 Tencent Cloud CLI 已登录
steps.action: Run Tencent Cloud CLI identity/status command without printing secrets.
steps.acceptance: CLI can identify target account/region。

steps.title: 确认目标 CVM 或部署目标
steps.action: Use Tencent Cloud CLI to list/select the target instance or service.
steps.acceptance: One target is selected; no destructive action。

steps.title: 上传或同步 Docker 部署资产
steps.action: Use Tencent Cloud CLI approved workflow to upload compose/nginx/build assets.
steps.acceptance: Remote target has deployment assets。

steps.title: 挂载服务并启动远端应用
steps.action: Use Tencent Cloud CLI/service command to start or mount the deployed service.
steps.acceptance: Remote service reports running。

steps.title: 验证公网 health
steps.action: Curl public `/api/v1/health`.
steps.acceptance: Returns `code:0` from public endpoint。

steps.title: 验证公网首页
steps.action: Open or curl public frontend URL.
steps.acceptance: HTTP 200 and LingoBridge page visible。

steps.title: 更新 acceptance report
steps.action: Update `tests/acceptance/mvp-acceptance-report.md` with local PM2, Docker, and Tencent Cloud gate status.
steps.acceptance: Report distinguishes pass, blocked, and pending_manual。

steps.title: 更新 PRD task status
steps.action: Update T10/T11 status based on latest gate results.
steps.acceptance: T10/T11 progress_note matches actual evidence。

steps.title: 运行 JSON 校验
steps.action: Run JSON parse check for `prds/prd.json` and `package.json`.
steps.acceptance: Both parse without error。

steps.title: 运行 TypeScript 校验
steps.action: Run `npm run lint`.
steps.acceptance: No type errors。

steps.title: 运行生产构建
steps.action: Run `npm run build`.
steps.acceptance: Build succeeds; chunk warning is non-blocking。

steps.title: 检查 git diff 范围
steps.action: Run `git status --short` and `git diff --stat`.
steps.acceptance: Diff only contains intended PRD/docs/config/report changes。

steps.title: 提交已验证进度
steps.action: Commit only after R056-R059 pass or blockers are recorded.
steps.acceptance: Commit message names the completed gate, e.g. `chore: add pm2 local verification plan`。

manual_demo_path: Student uploads, plays, downloads, and deletes recording
Teacher starts local screen share mode
Teacher switches to PDF mode and draws on canvas
Teacher toggles camera off and confirms browser indicator closes
Student finds replay in schedule/history by date
PM2-managed local frontend/backend ports are verified before Docker packaging
Public Tencent Cloud URL and health endpoint are verified after Tencent Cloud CLI deployment
